name: shiftlink
description: Digitaler Matching-Marktplatz für kurzfristige Pflegeeinsätze in Krankenhäusern, mit Fokus auf Direktvermittlung statt Zeitarbeit.

scripts.qa:browser-checklist: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js checklist
scripts.qa:browser-checklist-json: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js checklist-json
scripts.qa:browser-plan: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js plan
scripts.qa:browser-plan-json: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js plan-json
scripts.qa:browser-next: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js next-batch
scripts.qa:browser-next-json: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js next-batch-json
scripts.qa:browser-result-template: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js result-template
scripts.qa:browser-result-template-json: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js result-template-json
scripts.qa:browser-report: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js report
scripts.qa:browser-report-json: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js report-json
scripts.qa:browser-validate: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js validate
scripts.qa:browser-validate-json: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js validate-json
scripts.qa:browser-validate-strict: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js validate-strict
scripts.qa:browser-validate-strict-json: npm run build && node scripts/browser-qa.js validate-strict-json
